hero.title: Platform Cloud o Pandora
hero.subtitle: Leithio i-ngul, i-varn, a i-thala o FreeBSD na cloud infrastructure lín.

about.title: Peu {{projectName}}?
about.p1: CloudBSD na distribution o FreeBSD, i-gasar na environment am-hosting Jails, VMs, a OCI containers.
about.p2: Focus na system discovery, worker nodes, a management via Controller Service.

unifiedController.title: Unified Controller
unifiedController.desc: Configuration point. Jail, VM, Container-ur SeH fte lu.

smartWorkerNodes.title: Smart Worker Nodes
smartWorkerNodes.desc: Resource management, PXE boot support, am-base OS deployment.

nativeVirtualization.title: Native Virtualization
nativeVirtualization.desc: Bhyve VMM integration, virtual host, a hardware passthrough.

secureIsolation.title: Secure Isolation
secureIsolation.desc: FreeBSD-native Jails a Bhyve, isolation, a security boundaries.

gpuManagement.title: GPU Management
gpuManagement.desc: Hardware discovery, PCI passthrough support, a GPU resource manage.

zfsSecurity.title: ZFS-Native Security
zfsSecurity.desc: Storage reliability, data integrity, encryption, a instant snapshots.

hardenedServices.title: Hardened Services
hardenedServices.desc: HTTPS, automated certificate management, a redirection.

rbac.title: Role-Based Access
rbac.desc: User management, SSH key distribution, a role-based authorization.

ociSupport.title: OCI Support
ociSupport.desc: Run a manage Linux OCI containers sui FreeBSD na orchestration.

discovery.title: System Discovery
discovery.desc: Hardware reporting o RAM, CPU, Disks, a Network interfaces.

apiFirst.title: API First
apiFirst.desc: Management APIs, internal a external system integration, a automation.

community.title: Join Olo'
community.desc: Help, ideas, a contribute am-future o CloudBSD.
